recommendations.title: Ten Inch Hero
recommendations.overview: Four friends search for love and happiness while working at a California sandwich shop.

recommendations.title: Fantozzi: White Collar Blues
recommendations.overview: A good-natured but unlucky Italian is constantly going on a difficult situations, but never lose his mood.

recommendations.title: Still Out of My League
recommendations.overview: After breaking up with her dreamboat, Marta finds love with an artist. But life throws a few twists into the mix for the ailing woman and her friends.

recommendations.title: The Escort
recommendations.overview: Desperate for a good story, a sex-addicted journalist throws himself into the world of high-class escorts when he starts following a Stanford-educated prostitute.

recommendations.title: 5 to 7
recommendations.overview: A young writer begins an affair with an older woman from France whose open marriage to a diplomat dictates that they can meet only between the hours of 5 p.m. to 7 p.m.

recommendations.title: (Girl)Friend
recommendations.overview: Vincent and Nefeli just moved in together. They're best friends and swore to never fall in love again. That is until Vincent meets Julie.

recommendations.title: Ajab Prem Ki Ghazab Kahani
recommendations.overview: When his love interest doesn't show up for a meeting, a man and his friends go to Goa in order to find her, where they discover she loves someone else.

recommendations.title: The Last Summer
recommendations.overview: Standing on the precipice of adulthood, a group of friends navigate new relationships, while reexamining others, during their final summer before college.

recommendations.title: Husbands and Wives
recommendations.overview: When their best friends announce that they're separating, a professor and his wife discover the faults in their own marriage.

recommendations.title: Happiness
